input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A blue background displays a central blue box with a white logo, surrounded by a yellow robot figure, a black monkey toy, orange earbuds, a small drone, and a circuit board. White text on the right reads "gadgetcrate" above "A bi-monthly subscription box". A thin white border frames the scene. The image remains static with no visible motion.</think><answer></answer>

The left wrist wears a black watch while the right wrist has a brown bracelet as they manipulate the package.</think><answer></answer>

[4-6] A teal graphic with "TWITTER" and "BRANDONSALT" appears as hands rotate the box to reveal "GUARDIANS OF THE GALAXY" in black and "VOL. 2" in red. [6-8] The box remains centered showing the title text while the graphic vanishes. [8-10] Hands rotate the box back to the tree face side. Hands stabilize the box edges.
[20-24] A left hand reaches inward to grasp the top edge of the "STARLORD" patch, while the right hand moves to touch the patch's upper corner, preparing to lift it.
[24-28] Both hands lift the patch, holding it centrally in clear plastic. The patch displays a helmeted face with red eyes, bordered in black with orange stitching. [30-34] A left hand holds a Starlord patch in clear packaging while a right hand, wearing a brown leather bracelet, lifts a small plastic bag containing a silver object from a box lid printed with "WELCOME TO THE MARVEL COLLECTOR CORPS." [50-52] The blue Spider-Man box is removed, revealing a white "SECRET EMPIRE" comic with "MARVEL COLLECTOR CORPS" text. A small packaged pin sits to the right on the white surface. The camera maintains a static overhead view with no hands visible.
